race.comment: Looks a wide-open affair. STEIN (7) has placed over this track and trip and will be much better with that first-up effort out of the way. Maps nicely for this from gate five and must be respected out of the Munce yard. Likely to measure up. TRANSGRESS (4) has been plying his trade in harder NSW contests and will appreciate the drop back in company here. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to play a role in the outcome. SIESTA (6) has a win and a second from two attempts over this distance range and should get a cosy run from the inside alley. Can run a race while fresh. TEELG (1) was heavily supported at the Sunny Coast when resuming and didn't let backers down. Can go right on with the job now.
